passage_title: AIR TRAFFIC CONTROL IN THE USA

sentences.sentence: An accident that occurred in the skies over the Grand Canyon in 1956 resulted in the establishment of the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) to regulate and oversee the operation of aircraft in the skies over the United States, which were becoming quite congested.
sentences.translation: 1956年大峡谷上空发生的一起事故，促成了联邦航空管理局（FAA）的成立；该机构负责监管和监督美国领空飞机运行，而当时美国领空正日益拥挤。

structure.text: An accident that occurred in the skies over the Grand Canyon in 1956
resulted in the establishment of the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA)
which were becoming quite congested

difficult_points: that occurred...修饰accident，which从句修饰aircraft skies。
resulted in表示事故导致机构成立。

sentences.sentence: The resulting structure of air traffic control has greatly increased the safety of flight in the United States, and similar air traffic control procedures are also in place over much of the rest of the world.
sentences.translation: 由此形成的空中交通管制结构大幅提高了美国飞行安全，世界其他许多地区也采用了类似程序。

structure.text: The resulting structure of air traffic control
has greatly increased the safety of flight in the United States
similar air traffic control procedures are also in place over much of the rest of the world

difficult_points: has greatly increased是现在完成时。
and连接另一主句，说明类似程序的存在。

sentences.sentence: Rudimentary air traffic control (ATC) existed well before the Grand Canyon disaster.
sentences.translation: 早在大峡谷灾难之前，就已经存在简陋的空中交通管制（ATC）。

structure.text: Rudimentary air traffic control (ATC)
existed well before the Grand Canyon disaster

difficult_points: well before表示远早于某一事件。

sentences.sentence: As early as the 1920s, the earliest air traffic controllers manually guided aircraft in the vicinity of the airports, using lights and flags, while beacons and flashing lights were placed along cross-country routes to establish the earliest airways.
sentences.translation: 早在20世纪20年代，最早的空管人员就用灯光和旗帜在机场附近人工引导飞机，同时沿跨国航线设置信标和闪光灯，建立最早的空中航路。

structure.text: the earliest air traffic controllers
manually guided aircraft in the vicinity of the airports
using lights and flags
while beacons and flashing lights were placed along cross-country routes

difficult_points: using是分词短语表示引导方式。
while引导并列时间/伴随从句。

sentences.sentence: However, this purely visual system was useless in bad weather, and, by the 1930s, radio communication was coming into use for ATC.
sentences.translation: 然而，这种纯视觉系统在恶劣天气下毫无用处，到20世纪30年代，无线电通信开始用于空管。

structure.text: this purely visual system
was useless in bad weather
radio communication was coming into use for ATC

difficult_points: and连接系统无效与无线电启用两个分句。

sentences.sentence: The first region to have something approximating today's ATC was New York City, with other major metropolitan areas following soon after.
sentences.translation: 第一个拥有近似今日空管系统的地区是纽约市，其他大都市地区很快也相继建立。

structure.text: The first region to have something approximating today's ATC
was New York City
with other major metropolitan areas following soon after

difficult_points: to have...是不定式后置修饰region。
with短语补充其他地区随后跟进。

sentences.sentence: In the 1940s, ATC centres could and did take advantage of the newly developed radar and improved radio communication brought about by the Second World War, but the system remained rudimentary.
sentences.translation: 20世纪40年代，空管中心可以而且确实利用二战带来的新雷达和改进无线电通信，但系统仍很简陋。

structure.text: ATC centres
could and did take advantage of the newly developed radar and improved radio communication brought about by the Second World War
but the system remained rudimentary

difficult_points: could and did强调既能又确实利用雷达。

sentences.sentence: It was only after the creation of the FAA that full-scale regulation of America's airspace took place, and this was fortuitous, for the advent of the jet engine suddenly resulted in a large number of very fast planes, reducing pilots' margin of error and practically demanding some set of rules to keep everyone well separated and operating safely in the air.
sentences.translation: 直到FAA成立后，美国领空才实现全面监管；这很幸运，因为喷气发动机的出现突然带来大量速度极快的飞机，缩小了飞行员的犯错余地，实际上要求制定规则以保持飞机间隔并安全运行。

structure.text: full-scale regulation of America's airspace
took place
after the creation of the FAA
reducing pilots' margin of error and practically demanding some set of rules to keep everyone well separated and operating safely in the air

difficult_points: It was only after...是强调时间条件的结构。

sentences.sentence: Many people think that ATC consists of a row of controllers sitting in front of their radar screens at the nation's airports, telling arriving and departing traffic what to do.
sentences.translation: 很多人以为，空管就是机场雷达屏幕前的一排管制员，告诉到达和离场的飞机该做什么。

structure.text: Many people
think that ATC consists of a row of controllers sitting in front of their radar screens at the nation's airports
telling arriving and departing traffic what to do

sentences.sentence: This is a very incomplete part of the picture.
sentences.translation: 这只是整个情况中非常不完整的一部分。

structure.text: This
is a very incomplete part of the picture

difficult_points: is a very incomplete part是系表结构。

sentences.sentence: The FAA realised that the airspace over the United States would at any time have many different kinds of planes, flying for many different purposes, in a variety of weather conditions, and the same kind of structure was needed to accommodate all of them.
sentences.translation: FAA意识到，美国领空随时会有许多不同类型、不同用途的飞机，在各种天气条件下飞行，因此需要同样的结构来容纳它们。

structure.text: The FAA
realised that the airspace over the United States would at any time have many different kinds of planes
flying for many different purposes, in a variety of weather conditions

sentences.sentence: To meet this challenge, the following elements were put into effect.
sentences.translation: 为应对这一挑战，以下要素开始实施。

structure.text: the following elements
were put into effect
To meet this challenge

difficult_points: To meet是不定式目的状语。
were put into effect是被动结构。

sentences.sentence: First, ATC extends over virtually the entire United States.
sentences.translation: 首先，空管几乎覆盖整个美国。

structure.text: ATC
extends over virtually the entire United States

sentences.sentence: In general, from 365m above the ground and higher, the entire country is blanketed by controlled airspace.
sentences.translation: 通常，从地面以上365米起，整个国家都被受控空域覆盖。

structure.text: the entire country
is blanketed by controlled airspace
from 365m above the ground and higher

difficult_points: is blanketed by是被动表达空域覆盖。

sentences.sentence: In certain areas, mainly near airports, controlled airspace extends down to 215m above the ground, and, in the immediate vicinity of an airport, all the way down to the surface.
sentences.translation: 在某些区域（主要是机场附近），受控空域从地面以上215米开始延伸；在机场紧邻区域，则一直延伸到地面。

structure.text: controlled airspace
extends down to 215m above the ground
In certain areas, mainly near airports

difficult_points: extends down to表示向下延伸。

sentences.sentence: Controlled airspace is that airspace in which FAA regulations apply.
sentences.translation: 受控空域就是FAA规定适用的空域。

structure.text: Controlled airspace
is that airspace in which FAA regulations apply
in which FAA regulations apply

difficult_points: in which引导定语从句修饰airspace。

sentences.sentence: Elsewhere, in uncontrolled airspace, pilots are bound by fewer regulations.
sentences.translation: 在其他非受控空域，飞行员受到的规定较少。

structure.text: pilots
are bound by fewer regulations
in uncontrolled airspace

sentences.sentence: In this way, the recreational pilot who simply wishes to go flying for a while without all the restrictions imposed by the FAA has only to stay in uncontrolled airspace, below 365m, while the pilot who does want the protection afforded by ATC can easily enter the controlled airspace.
sentences.translation: 这样，只想暂时飞行、不想受FAA诸多限制的娱乐飞行员，只要留在365米以下的非受控空域即可；而想获得空管保护的飞行员则可以轻松进入受控空域。

structure.text: the recreational pilot who simply wishes to go flying for a while without all the restrictions imposed by the FAA
has only to stay in uncontrolled airspace, below 365m
while the pilot who does want the protection afforded by ATC can easily enter the controlled airspace

difficult_points: who引导两个定语从句修饰pilot。
while连接两类飞行员的对比行为。

sentences.sentence: The FAA then recognised two types of operating environments.
sentences.translation: FAA随后确认了两类运行环境。

structure.text: The FAA
recognised two types of operating environments
then

sentences.sentence: In good meteorological conditions, flying would be permitted under Visual Flight Rules (VFR), which suggests a strong reliance on visual cues to maintain an acceptable level of safety.
sentences.translation: 在良好气象条件下，可以按目视飞行规则（VFR）飞行，这意味着主要依靠视觉线索维持可接受的安全水平。

structure.text: flying
would be permitted under Visual Flight Rules (VFR)
In good meteorological conditions
which suggests a strong reliance on visual cues to maintain an acceptable level of safety

difficult_points: which引导非限制性定语从句说明VFR含义。

sentences.sentence: Poor visibility necessitated a set of Instrument Flight Rules (IFR), under which the pilot relied on altitude and navigational information provided by the plane's instrument panel to fly safely.
sentences.translation: 能见度差时必须采用仪表飞行规则（IFR），此时飞行员依靠飞机仪表盘提供的高度和导航信息安全飞行。

structure.text: Poor visibility
necessitated a set of Instrument Flight Rules (IFR)
under which the pilot relied on altitude and navigational information provided by the plane's instrument panel to fly safely

difficult_points: under which引导定语从句修饰IFR。

sentences.sentence: On a clear day, a pilot in controlled airspace can choose a VFR or IFR flight plan, and the FAA regulations were devised in a way which accommodates both VFR and IFR operations in the same airspace.
sentences.translation: 天气晴朗时，受控空域内的飞行员可以选择VFR或IFR飞行计划，FAA规定的设计方式能够让两种运行在同一空域共存。

structure.text: a pilot in controlled airspace
can choose a VFR or IFR flight plan
On a clear day
the FAA regulations were devised in a way which accommodates both VFR and IFR operations in the same airspace

difficult_points: On a clear day是时间状语。

sentences.sentence: However, a pilot can only choose to fly IFR if they possess an instrument rating which is above and beyond the basic pilot's license that must also be held.
sentences.translation: 然而，飞行员只有在拥有超出基本驾驶执照要求的仪表等级时，才可以选择IFR飞行。

structure.text: a pilot
can only choose to fly IFR
if they possess an instrument rating which is above and beyond the basic pilot's license that must also be held

sentences.sentence: Controlled airspace is divided into several different types, designated by letters of the alphabet.
sentences.translation: 受控空域按字母划分为几种不同类型。

structure.text: Controlled airspace
is divided into several different types
designated by letters of the alphabet

difficult_points: is divided into是被动分配结构。

sentences.sentence: Uncontrolled airspace is designated Class F, while controlled airspace below 5,490m above sea level and not in the vicinity of an airport is Class E.
sentences.translation: 非受控空域划为F类，海拔5490米以下且不在机场附近的受控空域为E类。

structure.text: Uncontrolled airspace
is designated Class F
controlled airspace below 5,490m above sea level and not in the vicinity of an airport is Class E

difficult_points: 两个并列主句分别定义F类和E类。
not in the vicinity是省略be的短语。

sentences.sentence: All airspace above 5,490m is designated Class A.
sentences.translation: 所有高于5490米的空域划为A类。

structure.text: All airspace above 5,490m
is designated Class A

difficult_points: is designated Class A是被动系表结构。

sentences.sentence: The reason for the division of Class E and Class A airspace stems from the type of planes operating in them.
sentences.translation: E类和A类空域之所以划分不同，源于其中运行的飞机类型。

structure.text: The reason for the division of Class E and Class A airspace
stems from the type of planes operating in them

sentences.sentence: Generally, Class E airspace is where one finds general aviation aircraft (few of which can climb above 5,490m anyway), and commercial turboprop aircraft.
sentences.translation: 通常，E类空域有通用航空飞机（其中很少能爬升到5490米以上）和商用涡轮螺旋桨飞机。

structure.text: Class E airspace
is where one finds general aviation aircraft
few of which can climb above 5,490m anyway

difficult_points: few of which引导非限制性定语从句。

sentences.sentence: Above 5,490m is the realm of the heavy jets, since jet engines operate more efficiently at higher altitudes.
sentences.translation: 5490米以上是重型喷气机的领域，因为喷气发动机在更高高度运行效率更高。

structure.text: Above 5,490m
is the realm of the heavy jets
since jet engines operate more efficiently at higher altitudes

difficult_points: the realm of heavy jets是倒装式表语主干。

sentences.sentence: The difference between Class E and A airspace is that in Class A, all operations are IFR, and pilots must be instrument-rated, that is, skilled and licensed in aircraft instrumentation.
sentences.translation: E类与A类空域的区别在于，A类中所有飞行都按IFR进行，飞行员必须具备仪表等级，即熟悉并持有航空仪表执照。

structure.text: The difference between Class E and A airspace
is that in Class A, all operations are IFR, and pilots must be instrument-rated
skilled and licensed in aircraft instrumentation

difficult_points: that is...和which...分别说明操作要求与技能。

sentences.sentence: This is because ATC control of the entire space is essential.
sentences.translation: 这是因为必须对整个空间实施空管。

structure.text: ATC control of the entire space
is essential
This is because

difficult_points: This is because是原因连接结构。

sentences.sentence: Three other types of airspace, Classes D, C and B, govern the vicinity of airports.
sentences.translation: 另外三种空域，即D、C和B类，管理机场附近区域。

structure.text: Three other types of airspace, Classes D, C and B
govern the vicinity of airports

sentences.sentence: These correspond roughly to small municipal, medium-sized metropolitan and major metropolitan airports respectively, and encompass an increasingly rigorous set of regulations.
sentences.translation: 它们大致对应小型市政机场、中型大都市机场和大型大都市机场，并包含越来越严格的规定。

structure.text: These
correspond roughly to small municipal, medium-sized metropolitan and major metropolitan airports respectively
and encompass an increasingly rigorous set of regulations

sentences.sentence: For example, all a VFR pilot has to do to enter Class C airspace is establish two-way radio contact with ATC.
sentences.translation: 例如，VFR飞行员进入C类空域所要做的只是与空管建立双向无线电联系。

structure.text: all a VFR pilot has to do
is establish two-way radio contact with ATC
to enter Class C airspace

sentences.sentence: No explicit permission from ATC to enter is needed, although the pilot must continue to obey all regulations governing VFR flight.
sentences.translation: 进入C类并不需要空管明确许可，但飞行员必须继续遵守所有关于VFR飞行的规定。

structure.text: No explicit permission from ATC to enter
is needed
although the pilot must continue to obey all regulations governing VFR flight

sentences.sentence: To enter Class B airspace, such as on approach to a major metropolitan airport, an explicit ATC clearance is required.
sentences.translation: 进入B类空域（如接近大型大都市机场）则需要明确的空管许可。

structure.text: an explicit ATC clearance
is required
To enter Class B airspace

difficult_points: To enter是不定式目的状语。

sentences.sentence: The private pilot who cruises without permission into this airspace risks losing their license.
sentences.translation: 未经许可进入该空域巡航的私人飞行员可能会失去执照。

structure.text: The private pilot who cruises without permission into this airspace
risks losing their license
